utility_evaluation.REASONING: The required format lists 6 items: property, financing, legal_services, moving_services, setup_services, and total_budget. The final property solution includes all six of these items. Each item is fully specified according to what should be covered: The 'property' includes type, location, price, status, and features; 'financing' covers mortgage terms, rates, amortization, payments, down payment, and closing costs; 'legal_services' covers the scope and cost; 'moving_services' includes vendor, scope, utilities, and cost; 'setup_services' provides utility activation details and timeline; 'total_budget' includes cost breakdowns and totals. Therefore, all 6 required items are included and fully detailed.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: The AI assistant's final property solution describes a 1–2 bedroom modern condo in Toronto priced between CAD $420,000–$480,000. Among the ground-truth purchase options, the 'New Build' property matches this description exactly—it is priced at CAD $480K, modern, eco-friendly, and within budget. Therefore, the property corresponds to 'New Build' with rating 10. The financing option in the solution has ID 'MTG001' and aligns with a standard first-time buyer mortgage (25-year term, 4.6–5.1% interest, 17–20% down payment), which corresponds to 'First-Time Buyer' with rating 10. The legal service 'SRV_LEGAL_001' provides title search, conveyancing, contract review, and registration for CAD $2,500–$3,000, which closely aligns with the 'Premium Legal Package' (comprehensive, higher cost, rating 8). The moving service 'service_moving_001' by Downtown Toronto Movers Co. includes packing, transport, fragile item handling, and short-term storage for CAD $1,600–$2,000, which is higher than 'Standard Moving' (CAD $650, rating 9) but matches the 'Premium Moving' (CAD $1200, rating 7) level of comprehensiveness. Utility setup is included in the moving package and mentions major providers, similar to 'Premium Utilities' (rating 9). Thus, the mapped ratings are: New Build = 10, First-Time Buyer = 10, Premium Legal Package = 8, Premium Moving = 7, Premium Utilities = 9.

final_package_text:
{
  "property": {
    "type": "1–2 bedroom modern condo",
    "location": "Toronto, near downtown creative districts",
    "price_range": "CAD $420,000–$480,000",
    "status": "reserved for viewing and purchase consideration",
    "features": [
      "modern design",
      "open layout suitable for creative workspace",
      "good natural lighting",
      "balcony and modern amenities"
    ]
  },
  "financing": {
    "mortgage_option_id": "MTG001",
    "status": "confirmed",
    "amortization_term": "25 years",
    "interest_rate_range": "4.6%–5.1% (fixed/variable options)",
    "estimated_monthly_payments": {
      "420000": "CAD $2,050",
      "450000": "CAD $2,190",
      "480000": "CAD $2,340"
    },
    "down_payment": "17–20%",
    "closing_costs_estimate": "CAD $8,000–$10,000"
  },
  "legal_services": {
    "service_id": "SRV_LEGAL_001",
    "status": "confirmed",
    "scope": [
      "title search",
      "conveyancing",
      "contract review",
      "registration"
    ],
    "estimated_cost": "CAD $2,500–$3,000 (inclusive of disbursements and taxes)"
  },
  "moving_services": {
    "service_id": "service_moving_001",
    "status": "confirmed",
    "vendor": "Downtown Toronto Movers Co.",
    "scope": [
      "packing and transport",
      "fragile item handling",
      "short-term storage (1–2 weeks)",
      "utility setup coordination"
    ],
    "utilities": [
      "Toronto Hydro",
      "Toronto Water",
      "Bell/Rogers Internet",
      "Gas (if applicable)"
    ],
    "estimated_cost": "CAD $1,600–$2,000 total"
  },
  "setup_services": {
    "utilities_activation": "included in moving package",
    "expected_activation_timeline": "within 3–5 days post move-in"
  },
  "total_budget": {
    "property_price": "up to CAD $480,000",
    "down_payment": "CAD $81,000–$96,000",
    "closing_and_legal_costs": "CAD $10,000–$13,000",
    "moving_and_setup": "CAD $2,000",
    "total_estimated_cash_needed": "CAD $93,000–$111,000 before mortgage",
    "monthly_mortgage_payment_range": "CAD $2,050–$2,340"
  }
}
